NotFinishedOnTimeContext:
/* COMP-CTX-any */ /*INSERT INTO NotFinishedOnTimeContext*/
SELECT EVAL( 'ceil(SimulationLeftNumberRawMetric * ETPercentileRawMetric)/(ActWorkerCores * ActWorkerCardinality) - RemainingSimulationTimeMetricRawMetric', 'SimulationLeftNumberRawMetric,ETPercentileRawMetric,RemainingSimulationTimeMetricRawMetric', SimulationLeftNumber, ETPercentile, RemainingSimulationTimeMetric ) AS metricValue, 
       3 AS level,
       current_timestamp AS timestamp
FROM SimulationLeftNumber.std:lastevent() AS SimulationLeftNumber, ETPercentile.std:lastevent() AS ETPercentile, RemainingSimulationTimeMetric.std:lastevent() AS RemainingSimulationTimeMetric
MinimumCoresContext:
/* COMP-CTX-any */ /*INSERT INTO MinimumCoresContext*/
SELECT EVAL( 'ceil(SimulationLeftNumberRawMetric/floor(RemainingSimulationTimeMetricRawMetric/ETPercentileRawMetric))', 'SimulationLeftNumberRawMetric,ETPercentileRawMetric,RemainingSimulationTimeMetricRawMetric', SimulationLeftNumber, ETPercentile, RemainingSimulationTimeMetric ) AS metricValue, 
       3 AS level,
       current_timestamp AS timestamp
FROM SimulationLeftNumber.std:lastevent() AS SimulationLeftNumber, ETPercentile.std:lastevent() AS ETPercentile, RemainingSimulationTimeMetric.std:lastevent() AS RemainingSimulationTimeMetric
NotFinishedOnTime:
/* CONSTR-MET-any */ /*INSERT INTO NotFinishedOnTime*/
SELECT * FROM NotFinishedOnTimeContext HAVING NotFinishedOnTimeContext.metricValue >= 0.0
ZZZZZZZZZ:
/* VAR-any */ /*INSERT INTO ZZZZZZZZZ*/
SELECT EVAL( 'MinimumCores', 'MinimumCores', MinimumCoresContext ) AS metricValue, 
       3 AS level,
       current_timestamp AS timestamp
FROM MinimumCoresContext AS MinimumCoresContext
NotFinished:
/* SLO-any */ /*INSERT INTO NotFinished*/
SELECT * FROM NotFinishedOnTime

RemainingSimulationTimeMetric:
/* RAW-CTX-PER_INSTANCE */ /*INSERT INTO RemainingSimulationTimeMetric*/
SELECT * FROM RemainingSimulationTime_Sensor
ETPercentile:
/* RAW-CTX-PER_INSTANCE */ /*INSERT INTO ETPercentile*/
SELECT * FROM ETPercentile_Sensor
SimulationLeftNumber:
/* RAW-CTX-PER_INSTANCE */ /*INSERT INTO SimulationLeftNumber*/
SELECT * FROM SimulationLeftNumber_Sensor
